description_long: This is a small, rustic house with a steep gable roof covered in dark shingles, surrounded by a wooden fence and set on a roughly octagonal plot of land. The exterior walls are constructed from a mix of stone and wood, giving it a weathered, woodland appearance. The property features several coniferous trees, a well, a wooden signpost, and sparse shrubbery, suggesting a rural or forest-edge setting. The house has a prominent stone chimney, small rectangular windows with visible frames, and a front porch area with steps leading up to the main door. Decorative string lights or bunting are draped along the fence and house, adding a touch of charm. The overall scene is dimly lit, with a muted color palette dominated by dark browns, grays, and blue-greens.
description: A rustic, gable-roofed stone and wood house with a fenced yard, surrounded by coniferous trees and outdoor features like a well and signpost. The house has a cozy, woodland appearance with decorative lights and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch steps, and two large coniferous trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the gable roof, front door, and a barren tree to the left, with more of the yard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, a well, a wagon wheel, and the fenced perimeter with string lights.
description_view_3: Side view showing the house's side wall, well, signpost, and a large coniferous tree, with the fence enclosing the yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with small porch steps, no overhang, and decorative string lights
